summary: A solid new audience recording of the 1982 show that fans love, with surprisingly good sound for a floor tap.
review: Both reviewers give the tape four stars, praising the performance (“I love this show”) and noting that the audio is an unexpected but decent audience source. The first reviewer explains it’s a newly discovered floor‑recorded crowd mix that sounds better than his own masters, despite some typical crowd chatter and occasional yells.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 4‑star and uniformly positive; the show is praised while recording quality is described as surprisingly good for an audience source, leading to a solid overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Floor‑taped audience mix with crowd chatter and occasional loud yells; however reviewers note it sounds better than many other audience recordings and certainly better than the uploader’s own masters.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or individual songs were provided.
